deviations.description: The process model enforces that anesthesia is applied immediately after patient preparation, as indicated by the direct sequence between 'Prepare Patient' and 'Administer Anaesthesia' in the process diagram on page 1. Version 2 relaxes this requirement, allowing anesthesia to be applied at any point after preparation. The process unnecessarily restricts behavior by not permitting any delay or intervening activities between preparation and anesthesia.

The change in activity labels from 'prepare_patient' and 'apply_anesthesia' to 'patient preparation' and 'anesthesia' does not alter the actual process steps or their sequence, as the process model's activities correspond to the same real-world actions.
